message.content:
@startuml
title Compass Sequence Diagram

actor "User" as User
participant "HubSpot" as HubSpot
participant "TypeForm" as TypeForm
participant "TypeForm API" as TypeFormAPI
participant "Node App" as NodeApp
participant "S3 Bucket" as S3Bucket
participant "SES" as SES

rectangle AWS {
  participant "S3 Bucket" as S3BucketAWS
  participant "SES" as SESAWS
}

User -> HubSpot: Loads Compass
activate HubSpot
HubSpot --> HubSpot: Generate UUID to identify user
HubSpot -> TypeForm: Load embedded TypeForm survery
deactivate HubSpot

User -> HubSpot: Completes survey
activate HubSpot
HubSpot -> TypeForm: Redirects to HubSpot Landing Page Submission Form\nhttps://info.codurance.com/en/compass-details-submission
deactivate HubSpot

User -> HubSpot: Completes submission form
activate HubSpot
HubSpot --> HubSpot: Save submission info & contact in Hubspot
HubSpot -> NodeApp: Redirects to /report/submit/:uuid (to generate report)
deactivate HubSpot

activate NodeApp
NodeApp --> NodeApp: Start report generation
NodeApp -> TypeFormAPI: Gets survery questions & answers
TypeFormAPI --> NodeApp: Gets survery questions & answers
NodeApp -> HubSpot: Get user details
HubSpot --> NodeApp: Get user details
NodeApp --> NodeApp: Build report and render with jsreport
NodeApp -> S3BucketAWS: Upload report to AWS S3 bucket
S3BucketAWS --> NodeApp: Query report link
NodeApp --> NodeApp: Compose email data with report pdf link
NodeApp -> SESAWS: Queue email for sending
deactivate NodeApp

NodeApp -> User: Send email to user

@enduml
